messages.content: This popup will disable within 24h after donation for a minimum of 1 month! replace 'disable"
with "disappear". This popup will disappear within 24h after donation for a minimum of 1 month!
agian
Sure, here's another option: This popup will no longer appear within 24h after donation for a minimum of 1 month!
a depressing freedom, if not understood well enough. change 'if not understood well enough'
How about this? A depressing freedom for those who lack a clear understanding.
nah, onlyy change 'understood well enough',  keep the word 'understood'
Alright, how about this? A depressing freedom if not properly understood.
perfectly
Glad to hear that! Let me know if you need any further assistance.
no wait. change the word 'depressing'
Sure, what would you like to change it to?
your choice
Alright, how about this? A bittersweet freedom if not properly understood.
again
Sure thing! How about: A mixed blessing if not properly understood?
again
Alright, how about: A double-edged sword if not properly understood?
more depressing
Okay, how about: A harsh reality if not properly understood?
keep 'freedom'
Certainly, how about: A bleak freedom if not properly understood?
coming close
How about: An unsettling freedom if not properly understood?
It must be hard, having every possible timeline at the tips of your fingers. change "it must be hard" to something that sounds less sarcastic
Sure, how about: It's quite a weight to carry, having every possible timeline at the tips of your fingers.
again
What about: It can be a daunting task to have every possible timeline at the tips of your fingers?
keep 'it must be'
Okay, here's another option: It must be a challenging responsibility to have every possible timeline at the tips of your fingers.
again
Sure, how about this: It must be an incredible burden to have every possible timeline at the tips of your fingers.
1 word
Got it, how about this: Having every possible timeline at the tips of your fingers must be overwhelming.
again
How about: Having every possible timeline at the tips of your fingers must be a heavy responsibility.
1 word
Alright, here's a single word option: Having every possible timeline at the tips of your fingers must be onerous.
hahaha what is onerous?
I'm sorry, onerous means burdensome or oppressive.
i'll use daunting
Great choice! Let me know if you need any further assistance.
